UNSUBSCRIBE UNSUBSCRIBE RE:ACC VARITAS NAVIGATION [W_ID:28-170038]
Remove our email addresses from your mailing system as soon as possible.
We don\'t want to receive any circular emails or unsolicited correspondence. Yet your messages keep arriving.
If we continue receiving emails from you, we will consider this a case of harassment and will escalate the matter further through the appropriate legal or regulatory channels.
Remove the following email addresses from all your distribution lists without delay:
supereco@supereco.ae
office@setm.sg
Office@setm.gr

ops@tomasos.gr
tomasos@tomasos.gr
